aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Rule The Air due to their strong local presence and reviews, but their current content lacks conversational depth and AI-optimized structure.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC questions and answers.
Expand content to include HowTo guides for common HVAC issues and solutions.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with high ratings, photos, and accurate information.
critical_issues: No recent posts to engage with customers and highlight promotions.
Q&A section is underutilized; no proactive engagement with common customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to detailed HVAC maintenance tips and troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding content with HowTo guides.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to HVAC expert by creating in-depth content on energy efficiency, HVAC trends, and local climate-specific solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making Rule The Air the most cited HVAC expert in Hollywood.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-optimized content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured content and FAQ schemas consistently appear in AI search results for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Rule The Air.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your Path to HVAC Authority in Hollywood
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can make Rule The Air the top HVAC authority in AI search results.
